---
title: "set"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# dic

```{julia}
# definition
dict = Dict{String, Int64}() # limit the type of key and value, but not necessary.
dict = Dict("a" => 1, "b" => 2)
arrpair = ["a" => 1, "b" => 2]
arrtuple = [("a", 1), ("b", 2)]
dicfrompair = Dict(arrpair)
dicfromtuple = Dict(arrtuple)
arrkey = ['a', 'b']
arrvals = [1, 2]
Dict(zip(arrkey, arrvals)) # zip arr to dict
```

```{julia}
#indexing
dict = Dict("a" => 1, "b" => 2)
length(dict)        # 2
keys(dict)          # 键迭代器
values(dict)        # 值迭代器
pairs(dict)         # 键值对迭代器
# 字典遍历
for (name, value) in dict 
    println("name is $name, value is $value")
end
# get the val of some key
get(dict, "a", 0)  # if a not in dict, return 0, or not return value of a
```

```{julia}
# content operations
dict = Dict("a" => 1, "b" => 2)
delete!(dict, "a")
```
